items.title: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
items.summary: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.

items.title: JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
items.summary: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.

items.title: Accusers seek justice after unwanted explicit messages from Congressman Eric Swalwell
items.summary: He denies claims of sexual assault but admits " mistakes" and says he will resign.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普與莫迪通話　強調維持荷莫茲海峽開放重要性
items.summary: 印度總理莫迪（Narendra Modi）今天在社群平台X上發文表示，美國總統川普今天與他通話時，兩人強調保持荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）開放與安全的重要性。  率先報導這...…

items.title: 美伊新一輪談判現曙光　美媒：川普稱可能兩天內舉行
items.summary: 紐約郵報（New York Post）今天報導，美國總統川普受訪時指出，美方與伊朗的新一輪談判「可能於接下來兩天內」在巴基斯坦舉行。  川普告訴紐約郵報：「你們真的應該留在那裡，因為接下來兩...…

items.title: 帕蘭泰爾AI系統助攻美軍 伊朗戰爭首日產逾千打擊方案
items.summary: 在美軍轟炸伊朗首日，帕蘭泰爾技術公司人工智慧（AI）系統Maven在短時間內分析大量資料，提供美軍逾千個打擊方案。伊朗戰爭可能成為全球首個由AI即時支援軍事行動決策的大規模實例。  新德...…
